base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_death_reaper — a character (boss) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Death / Grim Reaper — tall cloaked-skull boss with scythes. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Death / Grim Reaper — tall cloaked-skull boss with scythes; 2-frame robe-billow. Secondary mansion-boss; spawns orbiting-scythes

nudges.delta: Grim Reaper — tall cloaked-skull boss with scythes
